channel.title: Audio on Neueste Angebote
channel.description: Recent content in Audio on Neueste Angebote

item.title: Realme Buds Air 5 Pro Wireless Earbuds With 50db Active Noise Cancelling Sunrise Beige
item.description: Es gibt ein Realme Buds Air 5 Pro Wireless Earbuds With 50db Active Noise Cancelling Sunrise Beige hier: ℹ️: [360° Spatial Audio Effect]Made in accordance with the HRTF head function model, our self-researched algorithm creates cinema-grade 3D spatial sound, so that the ear canal can feel the full range of immersive listening. [40ms Super Low Latency]In Game Mode, the earbuds can reach an industry breakthrough 40ms ultra-low latency, bringing ultra-high audio and video synchronization, letting you get deeper into the action during those intense battles.
